ProjectTitle: Development and Implementation of Community Engagement Framework
ExecutiveSummary: This project aims to develop and implement a comprehensive community engagement framework for the Philadelphia Police Department (PPD). The framework will include a community policing directive, clear standard operating procedures, and ongoing district-level support and guidance to enhance community trust and partnerships.

StrategicRationale.Objective: Develop and implement a department-wide community engagement framework, including a community policing directive, clear standard operating procedures, and ongoing district-level support and guidance.
StrategicRationale.CompanyGoal: Advance Trust with the Community and Partners

ProjectPurpose: To strengthen the Community Partnerships Bureau by establishing a standardized approach to community engagement that fosters trust, transparency, and collaboration between the PPD and the communities it serves.
StrategicObjectives: Create a community policing directive that outlines engagement strategies.
Establish clear standard operating procedures for community engagement.
Provide ongoing support and guidance to districts for effective implementation.
KeyDeliverables: Training Materials for District Engagement Teams
HighLevelRequirements: Engagement of community stakeholders in the development process.
Training sessions for PPD personnel on new procedures.
Regular feedback mechanisms to assess community engagement effectiveness.
ProjectConstraints: Limited resources for training and implementation.
Potential resistance to change within the department.
Need for alignment with existing departmental policies and practices.
ProjectAssumptions: Stakeholders will be available and willing to participate in the development process.
Community members will engage positively with the PPD during implementation.
Sufficient funding will be allocated for training and resources.
SuccessCriteria: Completion of the community policing directive and standard operating procedures.
Positive feedback from community stakeholders regarding engagement efforts.
Increased participation in community engagement activities.
HighLevelRisks: Challenges in measuring the impact of community engagement.
Changes in community dynamics that may affect engagement strategies.
